shots.visual_caption: Young man on stage with a slight shift in expression, transitioning from "WHO'S" to "THIS," static framing.
Close-up of a young man speaking passionately on stage, with the text changing from "STANFORD" to "STUDENT" between frames.
Text changes from "STUDENT" to "THINKS" while the young man remains in a static close-up standing on stage, no motion.
Close-up of a young man speaking passionately on stage, transitioning from "HE'S" to "STEVE JOBS."
Close-up of a young man delivering a speech on stage, with slight hand gestures and no apparent motion.
Close-up of a young man standing on stage in a black sweatshirt and jeans, shifting slightly as he begins to smile, static backdrop.
Close-up of a young man speaking passionately on stage, hands moving energetically between frames but facial expression remains consistent.
Close-up of a young man speaking directly to the camera, shifting from "THIS" in the first frame to "TONY" in the last frame, no motion.
Close-up of a young man speaking directly to the camera, with a slight zoom-in on his face while the text changes from "TONY" to "HE'S."
Close-up of a young man with a headband, transitioning from a boxing stance to throwing a punch, with the text changing from "HE'S" to "WALNUT."
Static close-up of a young man in a fighting stance against a whiteboard, the word "WALNUT" prominently displayed above him, no motion.
Close-up of a young man with short hair making a boxing motion on the right, while the left shows a surprised expression, with slight downward movement in the right frame.
